# BookFlow

 > BookFlow helps you absorb knowledge faster with AI-generated book summaries, key insights, and practical takeaways. We also have an AI chatbot whose goal is to help users personalize lessons from any book.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://www.getbookflow.com/)
- [About](https://www.getbookflow.com/about)
- [Pricing](https://www.getbookflow.com/pricing)
- [Support](https://www.getbookflow.com/help)
